title: Iran Carpet Export Value, Pahlavi & Early Post-Pahlavi Period (1960-1988) — extracted from Encyclopaedia Iranica
source_org: Encyclopaedia Iranica (Center for Iranian Studies, Columbia University)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION of numeric values embedded in narrative prose (not a table download). The two Encyclopaedia Iranica articles CARPETS xii (Pahlavi Period, by Willem M. Floor) and CARPETS xiii (Post-Pahlavi Period, by P. R. Jim Ford) were read in full via browser (iranicaonline.org blocks WebFetch with HTTP 403, so content was read live via the Claude Browser tool's get_page_text, which extracts the live-rendered article text directly -- not OCR of a scan). Every year-value pair below was copied verbatim from that rendered text; no interpolation or estimation was performed. The articles also reference 'Table 48', 'Table 49', 'Table 50', and 'Table 51' with additional loom-count, export, and price data, but these tables are NOT present as images or structured data in the online HTML version of either article (confirmed: zero tags on the page) -- only the print fascicule (Vol. IV, Fasc. 8, 1990) would contain them, which was not accessible. This is a genuine gap, not a fabrication.
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription from live-rendered Encyclopaedia Iranica page text, via browser tool)
frequency: annual, non-continuous (only years explicitly cited in the narrative are captured)
units: mixed: million rials or million USD as specified per row; year field uses the Gregorian calendar year in which the cited Iranian fiscal year (beginning ~21 March) starts
license_terms: Encyclopaedia Iranica content is copyrighted; used here for non-commercial research/citation purposes with full source attribution per row.
notes: The Iran Carpet Company (Sherkat-e Farsh-e Iran), founded 1935, held a state monopoly over 'quality' carpet exports for part of this period; by 1977 it controlled only 2-3% of total national carpet output despite its monopoly mandate, per the source article. Two years (1982-83, 1983-84) carry an apparent million/billion-rial unit ambiguity in the original printed article; transcribed exactly as printed, flagged per-row, not corrected -- see notes column in data.csv. Complements (does not duplicate) the existing 1956/57-1958/59 carpet export figures already captured in data/raw/pahlavi-era-primary-extraction/wb1960-exports-by-commodities-1956-1959/ (World Bank 1960 report: $17.1M/$19.5M/$17.4M). This dataset picks up from 1960 onward. FAOSTAT does not cover carpets (not an agricultural commodity), confirmed by grep of data/raw/faostat/tcl-trade-crops-livestock/filtered_iran_and_comparators.csv (zero matches).
failures: Table 48 (loom counts by center, ~1940), Table 49 (export commodity ranking table), Table 50 (1979-1988 export series), and Table 51 (1973-1988 Hamadan-area price series) are referenced in the article text but not present in the online HTML rendering (no images found) -- could not be extracted.
